items.message: No documentation update needed: the triggering push (ce470ec768a0ca38716159ec639b49e0756976ab) is a purely internal tooling change by the Azure SDK Bot. It bumps the UnbrandedGeneratorVersion to 1.0.0-alpha.20260408.2, updates lock/package files, and migrates generator test project solution files from .sln to .slnx format. No user-facing SDK packages, public APIs, types, or methods were added or changed.
